title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
prompt:
Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the kth largest element in the array.

Note that it is the kth largest element in the sorted order, not the kth distinct element.

For example, given nums = [3,2,1,5,6,4] and k = 2, the sorted array is [1,2,3,4,5,6], so the 2nd largest element is 5.

starterCode.python:

starterCode.typescript:
export function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {

notesForAI.coreIdea: Use a min-heap of size k: iterate through nums, push each element, and pop when heap exceeds size k. The heap root is the kth largest. Alternatively, use Quickselect for average O(n).
commonBugs: Confusing kth largest with kth smallest
Using max-heap when min-heap is more natural for this problem
notesForAI.expectedComplexity: O(n log k) with heap, O(n) average with Quickselect
